taskCreate.fileReferenceHint: Use @file to reference files. Drag and drop or {{pasteLabel}} to add images.

clearTrash.title: Clear trash permanently?
clearTrash.description_one: This will permanently delete {{count}} task from Trash.
clearTrash.description_other: This will permanently delete {{count}} tasks from Trash.

settings.title: Settings
settings.checkingInstalledAgents: Checking which CLIs are installed for this project...
settings.bypassPermissionsHint: Allows agents to use tools without stopping for permission. Use at your own risk.
settings.gitButtonPromptsHint: Modify the prompts sent to the agent when using Commit or Make PR on tasks in Review.
settings.notifyWhenReadyForReview: Notify when a task is ready for review

saveErrors.stillLoading: Runtime settings are still loading. Try again in a moment.
saveErrors.agentNotInstalled: Selected agent is not installed. Install it first or choose an installed agent.
saveErrors.chooseProvider: Choose a Cline provider before saving.
saveErrors.couldNotSaveProvider: Could not save Cline provider settings.
saveErrors.couldNotSaveMcp: Could not save Cline MCP settings.
saveErrors.couldNotSave: Could not save runtime settings. Check runtime logs and try again.
saveErrors.couldNotOpenFile: Could not open file on host: {{message}}

topbar.fetchFromUpstream: Fetch latest refs from upstream without changing your local branch or files.
topbar.pullTooltip_upToDate: Pull from upstream. Branch is already up to date.
topbar.pullTooltip_withCount_one: Pull {{count}} commit from upstream into your local branch.
topbar.pullTooltip_withCount_other: Pull {{count}} commits from upstream into your local branch.
topbar.pushTooltip_noPending: Push local commits to upstream. No local commits are pending.

shortcutDialog.title: Set up your first script shortcut
shortcutDialog.description1: Script shortcuts run a command in the bottom terminal so you can quickly run and test your project.
shortcutDialog.description2: You can always open Settings to add and manage more shortcuts later.

project.kanbanAgentHint: Add tasks, link dependencies, break work down, and manage your board. Try asking to create and link some tasks to get started.
project.selectProjectForAgent: Select a project to use the agent.
project.removeProjectDescription: This will delete all project tasks ({{count}}), remove task workspaces/worktrees, and stop any running processes for this project.

createTasks.title: Create tasks with Kanban
createTasks.description: Press c to create a task yourself, or talk to the sidebar Kanban agent to plan work for you. It can pull projects and issues from Linear and GitHub, then turn them into tasks your coding agent can pick up.

autoCommit.title: Auto commit and link
autoCommit.description: Create dependency chains of linked tasks that start one another automatically. Agents can auto commit their work as they finish, so you can orchestrate tasks in order and watch the board burn them down automatically.

reviewChanges.title: Review changes with comments
reviewChanges.description: Your workflow will feel like writing tickets, reviewing code, and shipping. Watch the agent work next to real-time diffs, then click lines to leave comments like you're reviewing a PR.

chooseAgent.title: Choose your agent
chooseAgent.description: Choose a coding agent to complete your tasks. You can change this anytime in Settings.
